cmd: $ErrorActionPreference="SilentlyContinue"; "DATE: $(Get-Date -Format o)"; "--- loombit_health ---"; try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8787/health | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "loombit DOWN: $($_.Exception.Message)" }; "--- lm_models ---"; try { (Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:1234/v1/models).data.id -join ", " } catch { "lm DOWN: $($_.Exception.Message)" }; "--- google_oauth_status ---"; try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8787/skill-blanca/oauth/google/status | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "oauth ERR: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
